---
title: "TMA CODEX - Analysis pipeline"
author: "Paul Marcoux"
date: today
date-format: "DD MM YYYY"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
  column: page
jupyter: sopa
---

# TMA CODEX Analysis

## Configuration and package loading

```{python}
```

```{python}
import scanpy as sc
import spatialdata as sd
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import anndata as ad
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import warnings
import os
import seaborn as sns

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
sc.settings.verbosity = 0
```

```{python}
def clr_normalization(x):
    x = np.asarray(x)
    positive_mask = x > 0
    if np.any(positive_mask):
        log1p_sum = np.sum(np.log1p(x[positive_mask]))
        n = len(x)
        geometric_mean = np.exp(log1p_sum / n)
    else:
        geometric_mean = 1
    return np.log1p(x / geometric_mean)
```

## Data loading

```{python}
zarr_path = "/home/paul.marcoux/Postdoc/Python/CODEX_TMA/data/FFPE-IO60-Eq09-25TMA-22052026.zarr"
sdata = sd.read_zarr(zarr_path)
table_key = "FFPE_IO60_Eq09_25TMA_22052026_adata"
adata = sdata.tables[table_key].copy()
```

```{python}
adata.obsm["spatial"] = adata.obsm["spatial_px"]
print(adata)
print(f"Markers: {list(adata.var_names)}")
```

## QC filtering

```{python}
# Filter by cell area -- remove debris and clumps using percentiles
area_low = adata.obs["area"].quantile(0.01)
area_high = adata.obs["area"].quantile(0.99)
print(f"Area filter: [{area_low:.1f}, {area_high:.1f}]")
adata = adata[(adata.obs["area"] >= area_low) & (adata.obs["area"] <= area_high)].copy()

# Filter cells with fewer than 3 markers detected
n_markers_detected = (adata.X > 0).sum(axis=1)
adata = adata[n_markers_detected >= 3].copy()
print(f"After QC: {adata.n_obs} cells, {adata.n_vars} markers")
```

```{python}
# Store raw counts
adata.layers["counts"] = adata.X.copy()
```

## Background removal

```{python}
# Per-marker background subtraction: subtract 10th percentile, clip at 0
bg_thresholds = np.percentile(adata.X, 10, axis=0)
print("Background thresholds (10th percentile per marker):")
for i, (marker, threshold) in enumerate(zip(adata.var_names, bg_thresholds)):
    print(f"  {marker:20s}: {threshold:.3f}")

adata.X = adata.X - bg_thresholds[np.newaxis, :]
adata.X = adata.X.clip(0)
```

## CLR normalization per core + scaling

```{python}
# Apply CLR per cell, grouped by TMA core
X_clr = np.zeros_like(adata.X)
for core in adata.obs["tma_label"].cat.categories:
    mask = adata.obs["tma_label"] == core
    for i in np.where(mask)[0]:
        X_clr[i, :] = clr_normalization(adata.X[i])
adata.X = X_clr
adata.layers["clr"] = adata.X.copy()

# Global scale
sc.pp.scale(adata, max_value=10)
```

## PCA + Harmony + UMAP + Leiden

```{python}
sc.pp.pca(adata, n_comps=30)
sc.external.pp.bbknn(
    adata,
    batch_key="tma_label",
    neighbors_within_batch=3,
    computation="pynndescent",
)
sc.tl.umap(adata)
sc.tl.leiden(adata, flavor="igraph", n_iterations=-1, resolution=0.5, key_added="leiden")
```

```{python}
print(f"Leiden clusters: {adata.obs['leiden'].nunique()}")
print(adata.obs["leiden"].value_counts().sort_index())
```

## Save

```{python}
output_path = "/home/paul.marcoux/Postdoc/R/SpatialOmics-CODEX/data/processed/adata_processed.h5ad"
adata.write_h5ad(output_path)
print(f"Saved to {output_path}")
```
